title: ProtocolWorkbench
description: A typed workbench for developing, testing, and validating protocol-facing servers such as MCP, TriTRPC, HTTP APIs, gRPC services, or A2A endpoints against an execution fork.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

executionForkRef.description: Execution fork used to host or exercise the server under test.

routingContractRef.description: Optional routing contract used by the workbench.

entrypoint.description: Entrypoint, command, or service reference for the server under test.

localMapping.description: Whether the server under test is mapped from a local workstation path or process.

previewUrlEnabled.description: Whether the workbench emits a preview URL for human review.

clientProfiles.description: Named client profiles used to exercise the server under test.

trafficCapture.description: Traffic and transcript capture settings for the workbench.

transcriptMode.description: Transcript style emitted by this workbench.

validationRefs.description: References to workflows, skills, or validation bundles exercised by this workbench.

artifactClasses.description: Artifact classes expected from this workbench.
